Name: Manx
Description: The Manx were once Hellbent. In ancient times the Templar fear that the Hellbent would escape the Hellholes, so they took several Hellbent Prime and had them breed until the results were the Manx. A ferocious line of hunters who above all, searched for any escaped Hellbent and kill them upon sight.
